numbering_note: VERDICT 074 is RESERVED for idea-engine PROPOSAL 063 (constant +11 offset map, ORDER 008 item 3). This verdict takes 075, the next free number; intake id simreq-010, next free in the simreq-001..009 lineage.

source_request.where: menno420/superbot-games control/outbox.md @ main HEAD ed2fabbef58f3b97a03e6586a4e03ad0ab89c451 (filed via games PR #92 commit 21937f3 per the packet's own NIGHT HEADLINE block)

asks_verbatim.a: Sell values — a per-species sell value (coins) for every not-yet-pinned species above, on the same curve family V043 pinned for minnow/bass/pike/legend_carp, including where the deepwater venue premium (tougher to land per legacy utils/fishing/venue.py) should sit.
asks_verbatim.b: XP — the per-species game_xp for every species above (V043 pinned game_xp = size_rank per catch; confirm or re-pin that mapping across the full 1–21 rank range and the deepwater scale), plus any xp_to_next / milestone consequence of a 21-rank table (V043's xp_to_next(L) = 50·L, milestones L10/L25).
asks_verbatim.fold_in: the open ## SIM-REQUEST · fishing-cook-economy · 2026-07-13 ... please serve that entry's asks in the SAME batch run — its cook-leg asks apply to every species this request enumerates; they are NOT re-specified here. (served as VERDICT 076, sims/verdict-076-fishing-cook-economy/)
asks_verbatim.naming_note: legend_carp does NOT exist in the legacy table — legacy has carp (shore, size_rank 10). ... The lab should state which reading its verdict uses.

source_request.legacy_reference_verbatim: in the legacy repo a raw fish sells for max(1, size_rank) coins (disbot/utils/mining/items.py _fish_value, @ a724e9d) and every catch awards a flat 5 XP (disbot/services/game_xp_service.py _AWARDS["fish"] = 5, @ a724e9d) ... the legacy values are CONTEXT for the sim, not candidate constants.

packet.closure: 16 files byte-copied into fixtures/ (games/fishing full core+sim + games/mining/core {energy,equipment,items,market} + package __init__ files), sha256 in fixtures/MANIFEST.sha256, re-verified by the runner before import
packet.drive_surface: games.fishing.core.catch.resolve_cast + games.fishing.sim.catch_sim.run — the packet's own resolver and harness; zero logic edits

roster.rank_mapping_derivation_R1: The request enumerates 18 not-yet-pinned SHORE species on ranks {2..8,10,12..21}; shore is size_rank 1–21 complete, so the pinned trio takes the missing ranks {1,9,11}; local order minnow(1)<bass(2)<pike(3) forces minnow=1, bass=9, pike=11. The only consistent assignment; disclosed as derived.
roster.shore_pinned_note: columns: species_id, unified shore size_rank, committed rarity_weight (VERBATIM species.py), committed sell value (VERBATIM economy.py / V043). legend_carp placement at shore rank 22 is convention C10's DISTINCT reading (mechanically tested).
roster.deepwater_note: 11 boat-only fish on their OWN 1–21 scale (request verbatim); ranks quoted verbatim from the request enumeration.

committed_constants_B0.v043_family_identity: round(8*50/w) == pinned sell for all four committed rows (the V043 registered family sell = round(c·50/rarity_weight), c=8) — asserted in B0

v043_s5_published_anchors.source: sim-lab control/outbox-archive-2026-07.md VERDICT 043 measured: line (originally @ 4d26aa7); reproduced via the packet's own catch_sim.run() defaults (seeds range(400), 40 casts/spot — packet protocol constants, not registry draws)

sweep.weight_law_C3: piecewise log-linear interpolation of ln(w) through anchors (1,50),(9,30),(11,15),(22,5); new shore species: w = round(k*what(rank),4); deepwater: w = round(k*delta*what(own_rank),4); pinned 4 keep committed weights AND sells verbatim, never rescaled
sweep.sell_fold_C4: sell = round(400/w) — Python 3 round (half-to-even), the V043 family at c=8 verbatim

worlds_C2.W1: shore venue: 21 legacy shore + legend_carp@22 = 22 rows; deepwater ABSENT (the packet ships no boat venue — the shipped surface; parity A1' judged here)
worlds_C2.W2: full 33-row table, deepwater reachable ungated at base weights (upper-bound world; ceiling A3' and the premium judged here; the boat-gate guardrail rides on W2)

criteria.A5prime: AMENDED PRE-RUNNER (see amendment_A5): integer sell WEAKLY increasing (ties allowed) in size_rank within each venue's populated ranks (shore 1..22 incl. pinned; deepwater own ranks), with the adjacent-tie count published per cell; plus legend_carp remains the strict shore apex (sell(rank 21) < 80)
criteria.A1prime: measured fresh@dock coins/energy in W1 within [0.85,1.05]*32/7 = [3.885714..., 4.8]
criteria.A3prime: max over all (spot,tier) cells in W1 AND W2 of coins/energy <= 755/56 ~= 13.482 (mining diamond-tool depth-4 proxy, V043's own ceiling)
criteria.premium: REPORTING: deep-vs-shore same-rank sell ratio (= ~1/delta by construction; measured and published per cell)

sweep.selector_S1: eligible = A5' AND A1' AND A3'; pick MIN delta (max deepwater premium subject to safety); tie-break: k with |fresh@dock parity − 32/7| smallest; then lower k

xp_arm.mapping: game_xp = size_rank per catch on the unified/own scales (the V043 mapping, confirmed rather than re-pinned; the request's own 'confirm or re-pin' lever)
xp_arm.ladder: xp_to_next(L) = (50*s)*L; milestones stay L10/L25 (recognition surfaces unchanged); s=1 = the committed ladder verbatim
xp_arm.P1prime: mean two-burst (60 casts) fresh@dock XP in W1 >= xp_to_next(1) = 50*s
xp_arm.P2prime: XP/h strictly increasing with gear tier at every spot in W1 (casts/h = 180 sustained per C12)
xp_arm.P3prime: hours to L25 sustained master@deep_water in W2 within [24, 120] (V043 P3 band verbatim; cumulative XP to L25 = 15000*s)
xp_arm.selector_S2: smallest s passing P1' AND P2' AND P3'; if none, the XP arm returns NULL-XP (sell arm may still approve; consequence named) — split-arm outcome per the V043 two-arm precedent

conventions.C1: species-table injection is DATA-only: the byte-copied species module's _SPECIES/_BY_ID/MAX_SIZE_RANK are rebuilt from candidate rows (the packet's own documented growth surface: 'grow it by adding rows'); resolver/harness code untouched, MANIFEST re-verified before import
conventions.C2: worlds W4/W1/W2 as defined in sweep.worlds_C2
conventions.C3: weight law as defined in sweep.weight_law_C3
conventions.C4: sell fold as defined in sweep.sell_fold_C4
conventions.C5: measurement loop mirrors the packet harness: per (world,spot,tier,seed) 40 casts; per-cast rng = random.Random(fishing_seed(seed, spot+':'+str(i))) shared across tiers (the packet's apples-to-apples convention); casts at full energy (sustained-throttle frame); coins/energy = total sell coins / total energy per (spot,tier) aggregated over seeds
conventions.C6: seeds — eval 20261389..20261488 (100 world-seeds), stability 20261489..20261508 (20), all strictly above fleet high-water 20261388; B0 uses the packet's own protocol seeds range(400) (packet constants, not registry draws — the V043 disclosure); this PR's sibling VERDICT 076 reserves 20261509..20261558; new fleet high-water 20261558
conventions.C7: XP measured in the C5 loop folding xp=size_rank on bites; two-burst = 60 consecutive casts fresh@dock per seed, mean over eval seeds
conventions.C8: results.json canonical: json.dumps sort_keys=True; reported floats round(x,6); decision-bearing exact values also recorded as [num,den] where rational
conventions.C9: decision order: INVALID (any B0 assertion fails) -> REJECT (zero eligible cells) -> APPROVE-WITH-CONSTANTS (S1 cell + S2 ladder) -> NULL (named axes: stability band break; split-arm NULL-XP)
conventions.C10: naming leg: supersede reading tested mechanically — legend_carp at legacy carp's rank 10 with its VERBATIM 80 vs pinned pike 27 at rank 11 breaks A5' by construction => DISTINCT reading; carp stays; all 29 rows stand (the request's 'state which reading' ask, answered mechanically)
conventions.C11: B0 bars: the five v043_s5_published_anchors groups reproduce EXACTLY at the published rounding (deterministic harness)
conventions.C12: hours frame: 360 energy/h (REGEN_SECONDS 10) => 180 casts/h sustained — the V043 frame

amendment_A5.when: registration time, BEFORE the runner exists (separate commit in the PR #139 git trail; no run had happened)
amendment_A5.what: A5' re-registered from STRICTLY increasing to WEAKLY increasing (ties allowed, adjacent-tie count published), keeping legend_carp as the strict shore apex
amendment_A5.why_theorem_F_STRICT: Strict integer monotonicity is IMPOSSIBLE given the verbatim pins, by counting: minnow = 8 at unified shore rank 1 and bass = 13 at rank 9 leave SEVEN intermediate ranks (2..8) but only FOUR intermediate integers (9,10,11,12). No weight assignment, k, or delta can satisfy the strict reading — the failure is arithmetic, not a tuning miss. Derived from the pinned constants alone at registration; published in the verdict as finding F-STRICT (the V043 A5 strict invariant survives on any 4-species subtable but cannot extend to the 21-rank legacy scale at integer coins with those two pins verbatim).
amendment_A5.discipline_note: fixtures-before-runner is preserved: this amendment precedes the runner commit and the first run; the no-fix-forwards rule binds AFTER the first run, which has not happened

disclosed_before_runner: This file is committed BEFORE the runner exists (git trail on PR #139). The first complete run of the registered pipeline is the accepted run — no fix-forwards.
limits_registered: legacy rarity weights and the legacy venue difficulty (utils/fishing/venue.py) are NOT readable from this session (menno420/superbot not in scope) — the request quotes legacy sell/XP as CONTEXT only; the weight law is anchored solely to the packet's own committed rows, disclosed as C3

spot weight_mult rows for the 29 new species are the SEAM's wiring surface, not this verdict's — evaluation uses base weights at the committed spots (new species default multiplier 1.0, the packet's own silent-row semantics)
model-true engine arithmetic under sustained greedy play, not measured player behaviour (V043 G1 restated); live earn-rate telemetry supersedes wherever they disagree
